# appPermissionsGetMask

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

React Query query hook for appPermissionsGetMask

## Usage

```typescript
useAppPermissionsGetMaskQuery({ ids: '<UUID>' })
```

## Examples

```typescript
const { data, isLoading } = useAppPermissionsGetMaskQuery({ ids: '<UUID>' });
```
